title: Cortex Detection Model — API I/O Contract
description: Defines the request (input) and response (output) schema for the Cortex defect-detection model. All consumers and producers of detection results MUST conform to this contract.

bounding_box.description: Axis-aligned bounding box in pixel coordinates, anchored at the top-left corner of the image.

x.description: Horizontal offset (px) of the top-left corner from the image origin.

y.description: Vertical offset (px) of the top-left corner from the image origin.

detection.description: A single defect detection produced by the model.

defect_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this detection instance (UUID v4 recommended).

confidence.description: Model confidence score for this detection (0 = no confidence, 1 = maximum confidence).

mask.description: Optional segmentation mask. Either a base64-encoded binary mask (PNG) or an RLE-encoded mask string. Null when instance segmentation is not available.

mask_encoding.description: Encoding format of the 'mask' field. 'base64_png' for base64-encoded PNG binary mask, 'rle' for run-length encoded mask, 'none' when no mask is provided.

mask_shape.description: Shape of the decoded mask as [height, width] in pixels. Required when 'mask' is not null.

config_overrides.description: Optional runtime overrides for pipeline parameters. Keys must match top-level sections in pipeline_config.yaml. Only the specified keys are overridden; all others retain their default values.

request.description: Input payload sent to the Cortex detection model.

image_path.description: Absolute or relative filesystem path to the input image. At least one of 'image_path' or 'image_array' must be provided.

image_array.description: Optional. The image as a nested numerical array (HxWxC, uint8). Useful for in-memory pipelines that skip disk I/O. When both 'image_path' and 'image_array' are provided, 'image_array' takes precedence.

response.description: Output payload returned by the Cortex detection model.

status.description: Overall status of the inference call.

image_path.description: Echo of the input image path (null if image_array was used).

image_width_px.description: Width of the processed image in pixels.

image_height_px.description: Height of the processed image in pixels.

model_version.description: Semantic version of the detection model that produced these results.

detections.description: List of defect detections. Empty array when no defects are found.

error_message.description: Human-readable error description when status is 'error'. Null on success.
